prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约11696→13380→15256→12571→21548名。2021-2023年理科位次持续后移，2024年物理类首年新高考位次略有回升至12571 名，但2025年大幅后移至21548名，一年间后移约8977名，反映新高考模式下该校在物理类考生中的竞争热度明显下降；2021-2023年理科计划分别为17、17、15 人；2024年物理类计划10人，2025年物理类计划11人；2026年物理类计划大幅扩至25人，较2025年增加14人，增幅约127%。大幅扩招将显著增加录取名额，使竞争压力明显 缓解，位次数字趋于后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北师范大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第48名，近年排名稳步上升（2021年49→2022年44→2023年53→ 2024年46→2025年45→2026年48），稳居全国前50，在师范类院校中仅次于北京师范大学和华东师范大学；2026年声誉评价为偏正面，主要因该校硕士报考热度高 （拟招3100人，报考预估超1.5万），教育学领域人气旺盛；抖音热度排名第67位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光量中等；未见明显投档断档或录取异常记录，整体舆情平稳偏正 面；第五轮学科评估中，马克思主义理论A+、世界史A+、教育学A+、统计学A、生态学A-、生物学A-，共6个A类学科。物理类招生专业中，数学类对应数学（A） 、统计学（A）；生物科学类对应生物学（A-）、生态学（A-）；化学对应化学（未单独评级）；计算机类对应计算机科学与技术（未单独评级）；物理学类对应物理学（未单独 评级）。师范类王牌学科对考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信等专业社会热度持续高热推荐，数学/统计类专业偏热推荐，师范/教育类专业 分化观望但公费师范生政策仍具吸引力；广西2026年普通高考考生总数约392000人，较2025年历史类+物理类合计379582人增加约12418人，考生规模扩大使整体竞争加剧；东北师范大学位于吉林省长春市，属东北地区，广西考生对该校的 地域偏好一般；该校在广西招生计划占比较小（2025年物理类仅11人），属于跨省招生中的中等规模，地域因素对报考热度影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移 的走势惯性、2026年物理类招生计划大幅扩招127%带来的竞争缓解效应、声誉偏正面及考生总数增加等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次约37954名，区间37454-38454名。扩招是 推动位次后移的最关键因素，而声誉正面和考生增加仅部分抵消扩招影响。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 11696 → 13380 → 15256 → 12571 → 21548. From 2021 to 2023, the Science rankings continued to decline. In 2024, the first year of the new Gaokao for the Physics Category, the ranking slightly recovered to 12571, but in 2025 it significantly dropped to 21548, a decline of about 8977 positions in one year, reflecting a notable decrease in the university's competitive popularity among Physics Category candidates under the new Gaokao model. From 2021 to 2023, the Science enrollment plans were 17, 17, and 15 respectively. In 2024, the Physics Category plan was 10, in 2025 it was 11, and in 2026 it significantly expanded to 25, an increase of 14 compared to 2025, a growth of about 127%. The substantial expansion will significantly increase admission slots, easing competitive pressure and causing rankings to shift backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Normal University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 48th, with a steadily rising ranking in recent years (2021: 49 → 2022: 44 → 2023: 53 → 2024: 46 → 2025: 45 → 2026: 48), firmly in the national top 50, second only to Beijing Normal University and East China Normal University among normal universities. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly positive, mainly due to high popularity in master's degree applications (planned enrollment of 3100, with an estimated over 15,000 applicants) and strong interest in the field of education. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 67th, rated as average, with moderate exposure on short video platforms. No significant admission gaps or abnormal admission records have been observed, and overall public opinion is stable and slightly positive. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it achieved A+ in Marxist Theory, World History, and Education, A in Statistics, and A- in Ecology and Biology, totaling 6 A-level disciplines. Among the Physics Category enrollment majors, Mathematics corresponds to Mathematics (A) and Statistics (A); Biological Sciences corresponds to Biology (A-) and Ecology (A-); Chemistry corresponds to Chemistry (not individually rated); Computer corresponds to Computer Science and Technology (not individually rated); Physics corresponds to Physics (not individually rated). The flagship normal disciplines continue to attract candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer, Electronic Information/Communication are consistently highly recommended due to social popularity. Mathematics/Statistics majors are moderately recommended. Normal/Education majors show divergence and require observation, but the policy for publicly-funded normal students remains attractive. In 2026, the total number of regular Gaokao candidates in Guangxi is approximately 392,000, an increase of about 12,418 compared to the combined 379,582 History and Physics candidates in 2025, intensifying overall competition. Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun, Jilin Province, in the Northeast region. Guangxi candidates generally have average regional preference for this university. The university's enrollment plan in Guangxi is relatively small (only 11 in the Physics Category in 2025), representing a medium scale among cross-provincial enrollments, so regional factors have limited impact on application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the inertia of the significant ranking decline in 2025, the competitive relief from the 127% expansion of the Physics Category enrollment plan in 2026, the slightly positive reputation, and the increase in candidate numbers, the predicted minimum ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 37954, with a range of 37454-38454. The expansion is the most critical factor driving the ranking backward, while the positive reputation and candidate increase only partially offset the impact of the expansion.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Normal), Statistics)
- Physics (including Physics (Normal), Electronic Information Science and Technology, Materials Physics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Biological Sciences (including Biological Sciences (Normal), Biotechnology)
- Chemistry (Normal)
- Computer (including Computer Science and Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Educational Technology (Normal)).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Environmental Science and Engineering (including Environmental Science, Environmental Engineering, Ecology)
- Geographical Sciences (including Geographical Sciences (Normal), Geographic Information Science, Human Geography and Urban-Rural Planning).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is approximately 37954, with a range of 37454-38454. Candidates with rankings in this range are advised to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, Tier 1 for reach, and Tier 3 for safety. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<37454) can aim for Tier 1 majors like Mathematics and Physics. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit (>38454) should prioritize Tier 3 as safety. Northeast Normal University's normal majors (Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Educational Technology) all offer publicly-funded normal or normal tracks, providing high employment stability and are worth special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Liberal Arts/History Category were approximately 1779 → 1548 → 1671 → 1662 → 3483. From 2021 to 2024, rankings fluctuated narrowly within the 1500-1800 range. In 2025, the History Category ranking significantly dropped to 3483, a decline of about 1821 positions in one year, reflecting a notable decrease in competitiveness among History Category candidates in the second year of the new college entrance examination. From 2021 to 2023, Liberal Arts plans were 7, 9, and 9 respectively. In 2024, the History Category plan was 6, and in 2025, it was 9. In 2026, the History Category plan expands significantly to 15, an increase of 6 from 2025, a growth of about 67%. This substantial expansion will significantly increase admission slots, easing competitive pressure and causing rankings to trend downward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Normal University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 48th, consistently ranking among the top 50 nationally in recent years, and third among normal universities, after Beijing Normal University and East China Normal University. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly positive, mainly due to high popularity in master's applications and strong interest in the field of education. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 67th, rated as average. No significant admission gaps have been observed, and overall public sentiment is stable and slightly positive. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, Marxist Theory received A+, World History A+, Education A+, Statistics A, Ecology A-, and Biology A-. Among History Category majors, Marxist Theory corresponds to Marxist Theory (A+), History corresponds to World History (A+), and Economics corresponds to Applied Economics (not individually rated). The number of A+ disciplines leads among normal universities, strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social interest in normal/education majors is divided and cautious, while Chinese Language/Literature majors are slightly hot and recommended, and Law is slightly hot and recommended. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Guangxi is approximately 392,000, an increase of about 12,418 from the combined 379,582 History and Physics candidates in 2025, intensifying overall competition. Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun, Jilin Province, in the Northeast region. Guangxi candidates generally have average regional preference for this university. Its History Category enrollment plan in Guangxi increased from only 6 in 2024 to 15 in 2026, a medium-to-small scale among cross-provincial enrollments, so regional factors have limited impact on application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the inertia of the significant ranking decline in 2025, the competitive relief from the 67% expansion of the History Category enrollment plan in 2026, the slightly positive reputation, and the increase in total candidates, the minimum ranking for the History Category in 2026 is predicted to be approximately 4846, with a range of 4346-5346. Expansion is the most critical factor driving the ranking decline, while positive reputation and candidate increase only partially offset the impact of expansion.
